method: live walk via Playwright MCP, signed in to test account at resume URL — drove form end-to-end to the Documents page (just before declaration+payment)
coverage: COMPLETE — review page enumerated all 44 step identifiers via 'Change ___' edit links. The 5 sections not visited during walk (applicantsEmail, hasAdditionalEmailEV, telephoneDetails, contactingByTelephone, identityNameForLeaveToEnterList) were filled at registration time, before the resumed session.
stop_reason: Reached Documents page (post-review, pre-declaration). Next steps are declaration acceptance + £135 payment. Per user plan: orchestrator stops at Review (or Documents); user clicks declaration + pays via the resume URL.

naming_conventions.form_action_pattern: /save/application.{N}.{stepIdentifier} where {N}=application index (0 for first), stepIdentifier=camelCase (e.g. standardGenderRelationshipOOC). Repeatable lists append .{itemIndex}: standardTelephoneDetailsList.0, otherAccommodationDetailsList.0, standardCriminalConvictions.0.standardCriminalConvictionType.
naming_conventions.field_name_grouped: Dotted notation: outOfCountryAddress.line1, dateOfIssue.day, earnings.currencyRef, phone.code, parent.dateOfBirth.day, accommodationDetails.dateRange.from.day.
naming_conventions.field_id_grouped: Dots replaced with underscores: outOfCountryAddress_line1, dateOfIssue_day, accommodationDetails_dateRange_from_day.
naming_conventions.checkbox_array_pattern: Multi-select: name='{base}[N]', id='{base}_{value}'. Examples: status[0..4] (employment), typeOfIncomeRefs[0..1], sourceRefs[0..3], mandatoryDocuments[0], otherDocuments[N], readAllInfo[0]='iConfirm' (declaration acknowledgement), armedForcesCareer[0]='armedForcesCareer' (single-checkbox-as-array).
naming_conventions.country_select: <select name='X'> with ISO-3 alpha values + paired <input id='X_ui'> autocomplete. MUST set both.
naming_conventions.money_pattern: {base}.currencyRef (select) + {base}.amount (number). Currency options dynamic (GBP + applicant residence currency).
naming_conventions.submit_button: <input type='submit' name='submit' id='submit'>. Use #submit. NOT a <button>.
naming_conventions.external_reference_field: <input name='externalReference' value='{uuid}'> — application UUID, matches resume URL.
naming_conventions.resume_warning_page: /resumeApplicationInProgressWarning/{uuid} appears on re-entry. Click a#existingApplication (Continue my current application).
naming_conventions.declaration_pages_have_readAllInfo: War crimes, terrorism, extremism, person-of-good-character pages have a checkbox name='readAllInfo[0]' value='iConfirm' that must be ticked alongside the answer radios.

post_review_pages.title: Documents
post_review_pages.note: Acknowledgement-only — no actual file upload here. Uploads happen via VFS Global commercial partner after submit.

edit_url_pattern: Each section has a deep-link edit URL: https://visas-immigration.service.gov.uk/edit/application.{N}.{stepIdentifier} (or .{itemIndex} suffix for repeatable lists). Captured from the review page's 'Change' anchor links.
harness_implications: Every page is now reachable via its stepIdentifier — page detection is action-suffix matching. Implemented in PAGE_SIGNATURES.
Declaration pages (war_crimes/terrorist_activities/extremist_activities) require ticking readAllInfo[0]='iConfirm' alongside the No answers. Add to widgets or handle inline.
Repeatable lists (telephone, accommodation, criminal convictions, name) end with an addAnother prompt at /save/{base}List action. Need to model 'add N items then say no' loops in orchestrator.
Some pages auto-skip when a parent answer makes them irrelevant (e.g. visa-refused-other-country only shown when visa_refused_other_country=yes).

Documents page has account-specific values: mandatoryDocuments[0] value='travelDocRef-USA-Zehua Zhang' (passport for {nationality}-{name}). Selectors must use name='mandatoryDocuments[0]' rather than id.
